data.name: Swagat Caterers - Enterprise Catering Management System
data.description: A complete digital transformation of a traditional catering business — built over 46 days into a production-ready full-stack platform with 1,343 API endpoints. Features bilingual (English & Gujarati) interactive menus, real-time booking calendar, multi-role access (Admin/Manager/Customer), staff financial tracking with visual analytics, automated bill generation with GST, and comprehensive reporting dashboards. Currently powering live catering operations.

data.name: SentinelAI - Intelligent Web Application Firewall
data.description: A production-grade AI-powered Web Application Firewall with full OWASP Top 10 (2021) coverage. Features 17 integrated security modules including ML-based anomaly detection (Isolation Forest + Logistic Regression), real-time SIEM dashboard, AI-powered attack explanations via Groq/Claude API, threat intelligence integration (AbuseIPDB, VirusTotal), honeypot traps, tamper-evident forensic logging, and automated multi-channel alerts. Comparable to junior versions of Cloudflare WAF and Imperva.

data.name: CareerBoost AI - Advanced AI-Powered Career Assistant
data.description: A comprehensive, production-ready career development platform leveraging AI to help job seekers succeed. Features ATS resume analysis with keyword optimization, job description parsing with match scoring, skill gap identification with personalized learning paths, 20+ career roadmaps with curated resources, AI-powered interview prep with real-time feedback, and a job application tracker. Built with React, FastAPI, spaCy NLP, and MongoDB.

data.name: GATE MASTER - Comprehensive Web-Based GATE Preparation Platform
data.description: A full-stack educational platform for GATE Computer Science aspirants featuring practice zones, realistic mock tests, daily challenges, performance analytics, study materials, and leaderboards — built to democratize quality education for all students.

data.name: GeoWar-Fitness - Location-Based Territory Capture Game
data.description: A location-based fitness game built with Flutter where players compete to capture real-world territory by walking, running, or cycling. Features GPS boundary drawing, anti-cheat speed detection, global leaderboards, and a real-time interactive map with multiple styles powered by MapLibre GL and MapTiler. Backend powered by Supabase.

data.name: AEGIS - Adaptive Enforcement & Guardian Intelligence System
data.description: A unified cybersecurity platform for internship assessment consisting of three integrated modules: TrustChain (tamper-evident cryptographic audit logging with SHA-256 hash chain), VaultRun (controlled code execution sandbox with AST analysis and runtime restrictions), and HoneySight (deception-based threat detection with behavioral analysis and real-time alerts). Features a professional dark-themed dashboard built with React and Tailwind CSS, backed by Python and SQLite.

data.name: AETRIX - Satellite Environmental Intelligence Platform
data.description: All-India Environmental Telemetry & Risk Intelligence X — a smart city platform built for the PDEU AETRIX Hackathon. Integrates multi-satellite data (MODIS, Landsat, Sentinel-2, SMAP) with ML models to detect Urban Heat Islands, monitor vegetation health via NDVI, identify pollution hotspots, and forecast environmental trends. Features an AI-powered action plan generator using Groq (Llama 3.3 70B) for 4 major Indian cities: Ahmedabad, Bangalore, Delhi, and Mumbai.

data.name: Coastal Threat Alert System
data.description: AI-powered real-time early warning platform for India's coastal regions. Integrates live sensor data, satellite intelligence, and machine learning to detect and predict coastal threats like storms, erosion, pollution, and algal blooms.

data.name: PreetVerseX - Personal Portfolio Website
data.description: A fully responsive and animated personal portfolio built using React.js, showcasing projects, experiences, education, and open-source contributions. Deployed on GitHub Pages with smooth transitions, modern UI, and modular components.
